testModifications.reasoning: No test files were modified by the implementer

criteria.criterion: AC1: components/TicketBoard.vue created accepting a tickets array prop
AC2: Container uses overflow-x-auto for horizontal scroll on narrow viewports
AC3: Exactly 6 columns rendered in order: CREATED, VERIFIED, IN_PROGRESS, VERIFY_FIX, CLOSED, REJECTED
AC4: Each column header shows status name and correct ticket count badge
AC5: 'New Ticket' button present only in CREATED column header and emits 'create' event
AC6: Tickets are grouped by status and each renders a TicketCard
AC7: TicketCard 'open' event bubbles up as 'open-ticket' from TicketBoard

reasoning: All 27 tests pass. Implementation is clean, well-structured, and follows all Vue 3 + TypeScript conventions. Proper use of shadcn-nuxt Badge component, correct event emission patterns, and proper prop typing. File is 72 lines, well under size limits. No console.log or any type issues. All acceptance criteria fully met.
